description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade includes a spacious, tiled porch area supported by columns and enclosed by a low railing, providing a welcoming entryway. Large rectangular windows are arranged in a row along one side, allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, neutral-toned material, contrasting with the warm, reddish-brown tiles of the porch and entry steps. A single main door is visible at the front, adjacent to the porch, and a secondary door appears to provide access from the side. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, spacious tiled porch, and large rectangular windows along one side. The exterior is finished in neutral tones with a prominent front entry and side access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiled porch, main entry door, and a row of windows along the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expanse of the hip roof and the enclosed back wall with minimal openings.
description_view_2: Back corner view showing the solid rear facade and a glimpse of the porch extending from the side.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the porch area, supporting columns, and the transition between the porch and main building.
